question: The bar chart shows the revenue for several years. Which statement best describes what can be concluded from the chart?

options.A: Revenue increased by the same amount each year.
options.B: The last two years have exactly the same revenue.
options.C: The revenue clearly rose each year, but the exact highest value cannot be determined because the tallest bars extend beyond the top of the chart.
options.D: Revenue was lowest in the final year.

explanation: The bar tops are clipped outside the visible plotting area, so equality or ordering for the clipped bars cannot be inferred.
